title: Don't fail on size.
body:
I think a created container which was never run will have no size struct
we should just return 0

If I ask for size I should see size not nothing if empty.  Remove the null if empty flag
Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
When running 
podman ps -a --sort size
It was blowing up and returning no containers since some had no size struct.  We should just default to 0 in this case.

@mheon @baude @umohnani8 @giuseppe @pehunt PTAL
I am really concerned that we aren't getting a size struct, though. We need to look into this.
Probably worth a Jira card or a GitHub issue mheon
